AssemblyDrawingInsert Method

Inserts a new assembly drawing. Views are added according to the View Creation rules of the standard file. A drawing can be inserted only when there is no active drawing.

Namespace:  Tekla.Structures.Drawing
Assembly:  Tekla.Structures.Drawing (in Tekla.Structures.Drawing.dll) Version: 2026.0.0-alpha00057080+93cd22c410a086ecc356b7088d4daaf2e12907eb
Syntax
C#
VB
Copy
public override bool Insert()
Public Overrides Function Insert As Boolean

Return Value

Type: Boolean
True on success.
Exceptions
ExceptionCondition
CannotInsertDrawingExceptionThrown if inserting a drawing when another drawing is active.
See Also

Reference

AssemblyDrawing Class
Tekla.Structures.Drawing Namespace
